## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between Sean Linehan (Exec) and Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) covering personal and business updates.](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sean's newborn daughter (4lbs) is in NICU, born 10wks early; healthy but needs feeding support](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Both are balancing new parenthood with startup responsibilities; Sean at Exec, Marcel at fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [fwd.digital facing growth challenges: AirOps pricing issues, considering migration, hiring needs](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Exec undergoing major infrastructure update, leveraging long-term engineer knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

## Topics

### Personal Update: Sean's Newborn

  - [Daughter born 10 weeks early, currently in NICU](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [4lbs, healthy overall but needs feeding tube support](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Expected home date \~Jan 16 (original due date), could be sooner](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Sean balancing hospital visits with work responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)

### Parenting Experiences & Advice

  - [Marcel shared early parenting challenges: sleep deprivation, constant care cycles](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Emphasized importance of skin-to-skin contact, cherishing early moments](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Suggested getting help with non-baby tasks (cleaning, errands) vs. direct childcare](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)

### Business Update: Exec

  - [Major infrastructure update in progress (first since 2010)](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [5-person engineering team, 3 with 5+ years experience](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Sean delegating QA process to team, focusing on high-level oversight](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)

### Business Update: fwd.digital

  - [Rapid growth causing challenges with current tools (AirOps)](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [AirOps pricing increase to $20k/mo, hitting usage limits](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [Considering migration from AirOps, but facing resource constraints](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Hiring additional engineers to keep up with demand](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Financial Management

  - [Marcel: \~$350k in bank, $400k in upcoming payables (45 days)](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Sean shared bootstrap experience: tight cash management, 6-week rolling financial review](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Emphasized importance of hands-on financial management for decision-making skills](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to continue evaluating AirOps alternatives while scaling engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Sean to oversee Exec's infrastructure update, trusting team for detailed QA](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Both to maintain work-life balance during intense periods of business growth and new parenthood](https://fathom.video/share/4f9Etav8gzZo8f_bxLbw2k_2sBG__em4?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
